## Summary

What changed?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Importer
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Tested with a sample trace
- [ ] Tested folder scan, if importer behavior changed

## Privacy checklist

- [ ] No private trace data committed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or internal paths committed
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed
